name: Crystal Station
explanation: A PCM-workstation synth in the late-80s digital lineage. Three original sampled voices — a bright percussive Piano, an airy Universe pad, and an FM Bell — are baked in as PCM and played back polyphonically, pitch-tracked across the keyboard, with an attack + decay amp envelope, a tone filter and a lush built-in stereo chorus. Controls: Voice (Piano/Universe/Bell), Attack, Decay, Tone, Chorus and Level. The PCM voices are original, self-authored CC0 content synthesised offline (no third-party samples).
